checklist.description: The agent fetches the URL and extracts standards from the document content.
Each standard is labelled as auto-checkable, semi-auto, or manual-only.
Findings for semi-auto standards are presented as needing human review, not as definitive violations.
Auto-checked violations include file paths and line numbers.
If the URL is inaccessible, the agent reports the error and offers direct input instead of giving up.
